Package com.commercetools.api.models.inventory

Class InventoryEntryStockLevelsBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.commercetools.api.models.inventory.InventoryEntryStockLevelsBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
Builder<InventoryEntryStockLevels>
public class InventoryEntryStockLevelsBuilder extends Object implements Builder<InventoryEntryStockLevels>
InventoryEntryStockLevelsBuilder
Example to create an instance using the builder pattern 

     InventoryEntryStockLevels inventoryEntryStockLevels = InventoryEntryStockLevels.builder()
             .build()

      public InventoryEntryStockLevelsBuilder reorderPoint(@Nullable Integer reorderPoint)
